GAP_params.command_line: atoms_filename=train_all_mbd_tagged.xyz core_param_file=../../corepot.xml core_ip_args={IP Glue} gap={ distance_2b Z1=6 Z2=6 cutoff=3.7 n_sparse=29 covariance_type=ard_se delta=0.5 theta_uniform=0.5 sparse_method=uniform : angle_3b Z_center=6 Z1=6 Z2=6 cutoff=3.0 config_type_n_sparse={bulk_amo:125:surf_amo:50:bulk_cryst:25} covariance_type=pp delta=0.003 theta_uniform=4.0 sparse_method=uniform : soap_turbo l_max=8 alpha_max={{8}} atom_sigma_r={{0.5}} atom_sigma_t={{0.5}} atom_sigma_r_scaling={{0.}} atom_sigma_t_scaling={{0.}} zeta=6 rcut_hard=3.7 rcut_soft=3.2 basis=poly3gauss scaling_mode=polynomial amplitude_scaling={{1.0}} n_species=1 species_Z={6} radial_enhancement={{1}} compress_file=compress_1.dat central_weight={{1.0}} config_type_n_sparse={bulk_amo:2500:surf_amo:1000:bulk_cryst:500:cluster:30:graphite:500} delta=0.1 f0=0.0 covariance_type=dot_product sparse_method=cur_points } default_sigma={0.002 0.2 0.2 0.2} openmp_chunk_size=1000 config_type_sigma={bulk_amo:0.002:0.2:0.2:0.2:surf_amo:0.002:0.2:0.2:0.2:bulk_cryst:0.0002:0.02:0.02:0.2:cluster:0.002:0.2:0.2:0.2:graphite:0.0002:0.02:0.02:0.2} energy_parameter_name=free_energy force_parameter_name=forces virial_parameter_name=virial sparse_jitter=1.0e-8 e0=-0.16138053 do_copy_at_file=F sparse_separate_file=T gp_file=carbon.xml
